verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ አድዋሊሆሙ ፡ ለ[ኤዶማውያን ፡] እምነ ፡ ገዳም ፡
                  ዘ[ፂን] ፡ እስከ ፡ ቃዴስ ፡ መንገለ ፡ አዜብ ።

translations.lxx: And the borders of the tribe of Juda according to their families were from the borders of Idumea from the wilderness of Sin, as far as Cades southward.
translations.kjv: This then was the lot of the tribe of the children of Judah by their families; even to the border of Edom the wilderness of Zin southward was the uttermost part of the south coast.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሊቦስ ፡ እስከ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ኅብር ፡ ዘባሕረ ፡ አሊቄ ፡ እምነ ፡ ፍኖት ፡ እንተ ፡ ትወስድ
                  ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሊባ ።

translations.lxx: And their borders were from the south as far as a part of the salt sea from the high country that extends southward.
translations.kjv: And their south border was from the shore of the salt sea, from the bay that looketh southward:

verses.geez:
ወተሐውር ፡ ቅድመ ፡ አቅራቢን ፡ ወትወፅእ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሴናቀ ፡ ወተዐርግ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሊ[ቦ]ስ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ቃዴስ ፡ በርኔ
                  ፡ ወትወፅእ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አስሮን ፡ ወተዐርግ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሰራዳ ፡ ወትወፅእ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ዐረበ ፡ ቃዴስ ።

translations.lxx: And they proceed before the ascent of Acrabin, and go out round Sena, and go up from the south to Cades Barne; and go out to Asoron, and proceed up to Sarada, and go out by the way that is west of Cades.
translations.kjv: And it went out to the south side to Maalehacrabbim, and passed along to Zin, and ascended up on the south side unto Kadeshbarnea, and passed along to Hezron, and went up to Adar, and fetched a compass to Karkaa:

verses.geez:
ወተሐውር ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሴልሞናን ፡ ወትወፅእ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወይከውን ፡ ሞጻእቱ ፡ ለደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡
                  ባሕር ፡ ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ አዜብ ።

translations.lxx: And they go out to Selmona, and issue at the valley of Egypt; and the termination of its boundaries shall be at the sea: these are their boundaries southward.
translations.kjv: From thence it passed toward Azmon, and went out unto the river of Egypt; and the goings out of that coast were at the sea: this shall be your south coast.

verses.geez:
ወደወሎሙ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ጽባሕ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ አሊቄ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፤ ወደወሎሙ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ መስዕ ፡ እምነ
                  ፡ ፍኖት ፡ እንተ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወእምነ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ኅብር ፡ ዘዮርዳንስ ።

translations.lxx: And their boundaries eastward are all the salt sea as far as Jordan; and their borders from the north, and from the border of the sea, and from part of Jordan—
translations.kjv: And the east border was the salt sea, even unto the end of Jordan. And their border in the north quarter was from the bay of the sea at the uttermost part of Jordan:

verses.geez:
ወየዐርግ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ግላዓም ፡ ወየኀልፍ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ቦራ ፡ ወየዐርግ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሊቶንቤዎን ፡
                  ዘወልደ ፡ ሮቤል ።

translations.lxx: the borders go up to Bæthaglaam, and they go along from the north to Bætharaba, and the borders go on up to the stone of Bæon the son of Ruben.
translations.kjv: And the border went up to Bethhogla, and passed along by the north of Betharabah; and the border went up to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben:

verses.geez:
ወየዐርግ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ራብዕቱ ፡ ለቈላተ ፡ አኮር ፡ ወይወርድ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ገልገል ፡ እንተ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ማዕዶተ
                  ፡ አደሚን ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ አዜቡ ፡ ለቈላት ፡ ወታወፅእ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ነቅዐ ፡ ማየ ፡ ሄልዩ ፡ ወይከውን ፡ ሞጻእቱ ፡
                  ነቅዐ ፡ ሮጌል ።

translations.lxx: And the borders continue on to the fourth part of the valley of Achor, and go down to Galgal, which is before the approach of Adammin, which is southward in the valley, and terminate at the water of the fountain of the sun; and their going forth shall be the fountain of Rogel.
translations.kjv: And the border went up toward Debir from the valley of Achor, and so northward, looking toward Gilgal, that is before the going up to Adummim, which is on the south side of the river: and the border passed toward the waters of Enshemesh, and the goings out thereof were at Enrogel:

verses.geez:
ወየዐርግ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ እንተ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኤኖ[ም] ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ አዜባ ፡ ለኢያቡስ ፡ እንተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡
                  አያሩሳሌም ፡ ወያወፅእ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሰ ፡ ደብር ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ ኤኖም ፡ ዘኀበ ፡ ባሕር ፡ እንተ
                  ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ኅብር ፡ ዘምድረ ፡ ረፋይን ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ መስዕ ።

translations.lxx: And the borders go up to the valley of Ennom, behind Jebus southward; this is Jerusalem: and the borders terminate at the top of the mountain, which is before the valley of Ennom toward the sea, which is by the side of the land of Raphain northward.
translations.kjv: And the border went up by the valley of the son of Hinnom unto the south side of the Jebusite; the same is Jerusalem: and the border went up to the top of the mountain that lieth before the valley of Hinnom westward, which is at the end of the valley of the giants northward:

verses.geez:
ወይወስድ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ርእሰ ፡ ደብር ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ነቅዐ ፡ ማይ ፡ ዘነፍቶ ፡ ወያበጽሕ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ደብረ ፡ ኤፍ[ሮን] ፡ ወይወስድ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ [በዓል ፡] እንተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ ኢያሪን ።

translations.lxx: And the border going forth from the top of the mountain terminates at the fountain of the water of Naphtho, and terminates at mount Ephron; and the border will lead to Baal; this is the city of Jarim.
translations.kjv: And the border was drawn from the top of the hill unto the fountain of the water of Nephtoah, and went out to the cities of mount Ephron; and the border was drawn to Baalah, which is Kirjathjearim:

verses.geez:
ወየኀልፍ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ በዓል ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወየኀልፍ ፡ እንተ ፡ ደወለ ፡ አሳሬቱስ ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡
                  አዜባ ፡ ለሀገረ ፡ ኢያሪም ፡ ወመስዓ ፡ ለከሰሎን ፡ ወይወርድ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ ኤልዩ ፡ ወየኀልፍ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሊባ ።

translations.lxx: And the border will go round from Baal to the sea, and will go on to the mount of Assar behind the city of Jarin northwards; this is Chaslon: and it will come down to the city of the Sun, and will go on to the south.
translations.kjv: And the border compassed from Baalah westward unto mount Seir, and passed along unto the side of mount Jearim, which is Chesalon, on the north side, and went down to Bethshemesh, and passed on to Timnah:

verses.geez:
ወያወፅእ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አዜባ ፡ ለዐቃሮን ፡ ወይገብእ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ መስዕ ፡ ወያወፅእ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ሶቆት
                  ፡ ወየኀልፍ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አዜብ ፡ ወያወፅእ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሌብና ፡ ወይከውን ፡ ሞፃእቱ ፡ ለደወሎሙ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ባሕር ፤
                  ወደወሎሙኒ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ባሕር ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ወሰኖሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the border terminates behind Accaron northward, and the borders will terminate at Socchoth, and the borders will go on to the south, and will terminate at Lebna, and the issue of the borders will be at the sea; and their borders shall be toward the sea, the great sea shall be the boundary.
translations.kjv: And the border went out unto the side of Ekron northward: and the border was drawn to Shicron, and passed along to mount Baalah, and went out unto Jabneel; and the goings out of the border were at the sea.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ዘአውዶሙ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: These are the borders of the children of Juda round about according to their families.
translations.kjv: And the west border was to the great sea, and the coast thereof. This is the coast of the children of Judah round about according to their families.

verses.geez:
ወለካሌብ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዬፎኔ ፡ ወሀቦ ፡ መክፈልቶ ፡ በማእከሎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ በትእዛዘ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወወሀቦ
                  ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ አ[ር]ቦቅ ፡ ደብረ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ኤናቅ ፡ እንተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ኬብሮን ።

translations.lxx: And to Chaleb the son of Jephone he gave a portion in the midst of the children of Juda by the command of God; and Joshua gave him the city of Arboc the metropolis of Enac; this is Chebron.
translations.kjv: And unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh he gave a part among the children of Judah, according to the commandment of the LORD to Joshua, even the city of Arba the father of Anak, which city is Hebron.

verses.geez:
ወሠረዎሙ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ካሌብ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዬፎኔ ፡ ለሠለስቲሆሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኤናቅ ፡ ለ[ሡ]ሲ ፡ ወለጠ[ለ]ሚ ፡ ወለአኪማ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Chaleb the son of Jephone destroyed thence the three sons of Enac, Susi, and Tholami, and Achima.
translations.kjv: And Caleb drove thence the three sons of Anak, Sheshai, and Ahiman, and Talmai, the children of Anak.

verses.geez:
ወዐርገ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ካሌብ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዳቢር ፡ ወስማ ፡ ለዳቢር ፡ ቀዲሙ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ መጽሐፍ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Chaleb went up thence to the inhabitants of Dabir; and the name of Dabir before was the city of Letters.
translations.kjv: And he went up thence to the inhabitants of Debir: and the name of Debir before was Kirjathsepher.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ካሌብ ፡ ዘነሥኣ ፡ ወቀተላ ፡ ለሀገረ ፡ መጽሐፍ ፡ ወአስተጋብኣ ፡ እሁቦ ፡ አ[ስ]ካ ፡ ወለትየ ፡ ትኵኖ ፡
                  ብእሲተ ።

translations.lxx: And Chaleb said, Whosoever shall take and destroy the city of Letters, and master it, to him will I give my daughter Ascha to wife.
translations.kjv: And Caleb said, He that smiteth Kirjathsepher, and taketh it, to him will I give Achsah my daughter to wife.

verses.geez: ወነሥኣ ፡ ጎቶንዬል ፡ ወልደ ፡ ቄኔዝ ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ለካሌብ ፡ ወወሀቦ ፡ አ[ስ]ካ ፡ ወለቶ ፡ ትኵኖ ፡ ብእሲተ ።

translations.lxx: And Gothoniel the son of Chenez the brother of Chaleb took it; and he gave him Ascha his daughter to wife.
translations.kjv: And Othniel the son of Kenaz, the brother of Caleb, took it: and he gave him Achsah his daughter to wife.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ለሐዊር ፡ ተማከረቶ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ትብል ፡ እስአሎ ፡ ለአቡየ ፡ ገራህተ ፡ ወጸርኀት ፡ በዲበ ፡ አድግ ፡
                  ወይቤላ ፡ ካሌብ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ኮንኪ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass as she went out that she counselled him, saying, I will ask of my father a field; and she cried from off her ass; and Chaleb said to her, What is it?
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, as she came unto him, that she moved him to ask of her father a field: and she lighted off her ass; and Caleb said unto her, What wouldest thou?

verses.geez:
ወትቤሎ ፡ ሀበኒ ፡ በረከተ ፡ እስመ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ናጌ[ብ] ፡ መጠውከኒ ፡ ሀበኒ ፡ ቦታኒስ ፡ ወወሀባ ፡ ጎኔትላን
                  ፡ እንተ ፡ ላዕሉ ፡ ወጎኔትላን ፡ እንተ ፡ ታሕቱ ፡ እምርስቶሙ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ይሁዳ ።

translations.lxx: And she said to him, Give me a blessing, for thou hast set me in the land of Nageb; give me Botthanis: and he gave her Gonæthla the upper, and Gonæthla the lower.
translations.kjv: Who answered, Give me a blessing; for thou hast given me a south land; give me also springs of water. And he gave her the upper springs, and the nether springs.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ አህጉሪሆሙ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ዘነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ በውስተ ፡ አድዋለ ፡ ኤዶም ፡ በገዳሙ ፡ ወቤሴሌኤል ፡
                  ወኣራ ፡ ወአሶር ።

translations.lxx: And their cities were cities belonging to the tribe of the children of Juda on the borders of Edom by the wilderness, and Bæseleel, and Ara, and Asor,
translations.kjv: And the uttermost cities of the tribe of the children of Judah toward the coast of Edom southward were Kabzeel, and Eder, and Jagur,

verses.geez: ወኢቀም ፡ ወሬግማ ፡ ወአሩሔል ።

translations.lxx: and Icam, and Regma, and Aruel,
translations.kjv: And Kinah, and Dimonah, and Adadah,

verses.geez: ወቃዴስ ፡ ወአስሪዮኔም ፡ ወሚናን ።

translations.lxx: and Cades, and Asorionain, and Mænam,
translations.kjv: And Kedesh, and Hazor, and Ithnan,

verses.geez: ወ[በ]ልማናን ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: and Balmænan, and their villages,
translations.kjv: Ziph, and Telem, and Bealoth,

verses.geez: ወአህጉረ ፡ አሴሮን ፡ እንተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ አሶር ።

translations.lxx: and the cities of Aseron, this is Asor,
translations.kjv: And Hazor, Hadattah, and Kerioth, and Hezron, which is Hazor,

verses.geez: ወሴን ፡ ወሰማዓ ፡ ወሞላዳ ።

translations.lxx: and Sen, and Salmaa, and Molada,
translations.kjv: Amam, and Shema, and Moladah,

verses.geez: ወሴሪ ፡ ወቤፋላድ ።

translations.lxx: and Seri, and Bæphalath,
translations.kjv: And Hazargaddah, and Heshmon, and Bethpalet,

verses.geez: ወኮላሶኤዳ ፡ ወበርሳቤሕ ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: and Cholaseola, and Beersabee; and their villages, and their hamlets,
translations.kjv: And Hazarshual, and Beersheba, and Bizjothjah,

verses.geez: ባላ ፡ ወባቆብ ፡ ወደብራቲሆን ፡ ወኣሶም ።

translations.lxx: Bala and Bacoc, and Asom,
translations.kjv: Baalah, and Iim, and Azem,

verses.geez: ወኤለቦሂ[ዳ]ድ ፡ ወቤቴል ፡ ወኤርማ ።

translations.lxx: and Elboüdad, and Bæthel, and Herma,
translations.kjv: And Eltolad, and Chesil, and Hormah,

verses.geez: ወሴቄላቅ ፡ ወመከርም ፡ ወሴተነኅ ።

translations.lxx: and Sekelac, and Macharim, and Sethennac,
translations.kjv: And Ziklag, and Madmannah, and Sansannah,

verses.geez: ወላቦስ ፡ ወሳሌ ፡ ወኤርሞት ፡ ዕሥራ ፡ ወትስዑ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: and Labos, and Sale, and Eromoth; twenty-nine cities, and their villages.
translations.kjv: And Lebaoth, and Shilhim, and Ain, and Rimmon: all the cities are twenty and nine, with their villages:

verses.geez: በውስተ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ አስጣሖል ፡ ወ[ሳ]ራ ፡ ወኣሳ ።

translations.lxx: In the plain country Astaol, and Raa, and Assa,
translations.kjv: And in the valley, Eshtaol, and Zoreah, and Ashnah,

verses.geez: ወራሜን ፡ እንተ ፡ ላዕሉ ፡ ወኢዱቶት ፡ ወመሐንስ ።

translations.lxx: and Ramen, and Tano, and Iluthoth, and Mæani,
translations.kjv: And Zanoah, and Engannim, Tappuah, and Enam,

verses.geez: ወኤርሙት ፡ ወኦዶለም ፡ ወሜምራ ፡ ወሰኦኮ ፡ ወሐዜቃ ።

translations.lxx: and Jermuth, and Odollam, and Membra, and Saocho, and Jazeca.
translations.kjv: Jarmuth, and Adullam, Socoh, and Azekah,

verses.geez: ወሰቃርም ፡ ወገዴራ ፡ ወ[ደብራቲ]ሃ ፡ ዐሥሩ ፡ ወአርባዕ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: And Sacarim and Gadera, and its villages; fourteen cities, and their villages;
translations.kjv: And Sharaim, and Adithaim, and Gederah, and Gederothaim; fourteen cities with their villages:

verses.geez: ሴና ፡ ወአዳሳን ፡ ወመገድገድ ።

translations.lxx: Senna, and Adasan, and Magadalgad,
translations.kjv: Zenan, and Hadashah, and Migdalgad,

verses.geez: ወአዳለል ፡ ወመ[ስ]ፋ ፡ ወይቃሬል ፡ ወማኬሳ ።

translations.lxx: and Dalad, and Maspha, and Jachareel,
translations.kjv: And Dilean, and Mizpeh, and Joktheel,

verses.geez: ወቦሴዶት ፡ ወይዴሓ ፡ ዶሌያ ።

translations.lxx: and Basedoth, and Ideadalea;
translations.kjv: Lachish, and Bozkath, and Eglon,

verses.geez: ወኮብራ ፡ ወማክስ ፡ ወመሐኮስ ።

translations.lxx: and Chabra, and Maches, and Maachos,
translations.kjv: And Cabbon, and Lahmam, and Kithlish,

verses.geez: ወጌዶር ፡ ወቦጋዲየል ፡ ወኖማን ፡ ወመቄደም ፡ ዐሥሩ ፡ ወስሱ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: and Geddor, and Bagadiel, and Noman, and Machedan: sixteen cities, and their villages;
translations.kjv: And Gederoth, Bethdagon, and Naamah, and Makkedah; sixteen cities with their villages:

verses.geez: ሌምና ፡ ወኤተቅ ፡ ወአኖክ ።

translations.lxx: Lebna, and Ithac, and Anoch,
translations.kjv: Libnah, and Ether, and Ashan,

verses.geez: ወአድና ፡ ወናሲብ ።

translations.lxx: and Jana, and Nasib,
translations.kjv: And Jiphtah, and Ashnah, and Nezib,

verses.geez: ወኢለም ፡ ወአቄዝም ፡ ወበቴሳር ፡ ወኤሎም ፡ ዐሥሩ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: and Keilam, and Akiezi, and Kezib, and Bathesar, and Ælom: ten cities, and their villages;
translations.kjv: And Keilah, and Achzib, and Mareshah; nine cities with their villages:

verses.geez: አቃሮን ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሃ ፡ ወደብራቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: Accaron and her villages, and their hamlets:
translations.kjv: Ekron, with her towns and her villages:

verses.geez: እምነ ፡ አቃሮን ፡ ጌማ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ቅሩበ ፡ አሴዶት ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: from Accaron, Gemna, and all the cities that are near Asedoth; and their villages.
translations.kjv: From Ekron even unto the sea, all that lay near Ashdod, with their villages:

verses.geez:
አሴዬዶት ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሃ ፡ ወ[ደብራቲ]ሃ ፡ ወጋዛ ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሃ ፡ ወደብራቲሃ ፡ እስከ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወባሕር ፡
                  ዐባይ ፡ ትፈልጦ ።

translations.lxx: Asiedoth, and her villages, and her hamlets; Gaza, and its villages and its hamlets as far as the river of Egypt, and the great sea is the boundary.
translations.kjv: Ashdod with her towns and her villages, Gaza with her towns and her villages, unto the river of Egypt, and the great sea, and the border thereof:

verses.geez: ወአድባረ ፡ ሳሚርሂ ፡ ወኢዬቴር ፡ ወሦካ ።

translations.lxx: And in the hill country Samir, and Jether, and Socha,
translations.kjv: And in the mountains, Shamir, and Jattir, and Socoh,

verses.geez: ወሬና ፡ ወሀገረ ፡ መጽሐፍ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ዳቢር ።

translations.lxx: and Renna and the city of Letters, this is Dabir;
translations.kjv: And Dannah, and Kirjathsannah, which is Debir,

verses.geez: ወአኖን ፡ ወሴቄማ ፡ ወኤሳማ ።

translations.lxx: and Anon, and Es, and Man, and Æsam,
translations.kjv: And Anab, and Eshtemoh, and Anim,

verses.geez: ወጎሶም ፡ ወ[ከ]ሉ ፡ ወ[ከ]ና ፡ ዐሥሩ ፡ ወአሐቲ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: and Gosom, and Chalu, and Channa, and Gelom: eleven cities, and their villages;
translations.kjv: And Goshen, and Holon, and Giloh; eleven cities with their villages:

verses.geez: ኤሬም ፡ ወሬምና ፡ ወ[ሶ]ማ ።

translations.lxx: Ærem, and Remna, and Soma,
translations.kjv: Arab, and Dumah, and Eshean,

verses.geez: ወኢየማይን ፡ ወቤታቁ ፡ ወፋቁሕ ።

translations.lxx: and Jemain, and Bæthachu, and Phacua,
translations.kjv: And Janum, and Bethtappuah, and Aphekah,

verses.geez: ወኤውማ ፡ ወአህጉረ ፡ አርቦቅ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ኬብሮን ፡ ወሶሬት ፡ ትስዑ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወደብራቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: and Euma, and the city Arboc, this is Chebron, and Soraith: nine cities, and their villages:
translations.kjv: And Humtah, and Kirjatharba, which is Hebron, and Zior; nine cities with their villages:

verses.geez: መሖር ፡ ወኬርሜል ፡ ወኦዚብ ፡ ወኢጣን ።

translations.lxx: Maor, and Chermel, and Ozib, and Itan,
translations.kjv: Maon, Carmel, and Ziph, and Juttah,

verses.geez: ወኢያሪዬል ፡ ወኢያሪቅም ፡ ወዘቃይን ።

translations.lxx: and Jariel, and Aricam, and Zacanaim,
translations.kjv: And Jezreel, and Jokdeam, and Zanoah,

verses.geez: ወጋባ ፡ ወተምና ፡ ተስዑ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: and Gabaa, and Thamnatha; nine cities, and their villages;
translations.kjv: Cain, Gibeah, and Timnah; ten cities with their villages:

verses.geez: ወአ[ሉ]ዋ ፡ ወቤትሱር ፡ ወጌዶር ።

translations.lxx: Ælua, and Bethsur, and Geddon,
translations.kjv: Halhul, Bethzur, and Gedor,

verses.geez: ወመገዶት ፡ ወቤተነም ፡ ወኤቴቁም ፡ ስሱ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: Theco, and Ephratha, this is Bæthleem, and Phagor, and Ætan, and Culon, and Tatam, and Thobes, and Carem, and Galem, and Thether, and Manocho: eleven cities, and their villages,
translations.kjv: And Maarath, and Bethanoth, and Eltekon; six cities with their villages:

verses.geez:
ቴቆ ፡ ወኤፍራታ ፡ እንተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ልሔም ፡ ወፋጎር ፡ ወኤጣን ፡ ወቁሎን ፡ ወጠጦን ፡ ወሶቤሔ ፡ ወቃሬ ፡
                  ወጋሌም ፡ ወኤቴር ፡ ወመኖኮ ፡ ዐሥሩ ፡ [ወአሐቲ ፡] አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ። ቃርያት ፡ በዐል ፡ እንተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሀገረ
                  ፡ ኢያርም ፡ ወሶቤታ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወደብራቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: Cariathbaal, this is the city of Jarim, and Sotheba: two cities, and their villages:
translations.kjv: Kirjathbaal, which is Kirjathjearim, and Rabbah; two cities with their villages:

verses.geez: ወባልዳጊስ ፡ ወተራበዐም ፡ ወኤሞን ።

translations.lxx: and Baddargeis, and Tharabaam, and Ænon;
translations.kjv: In the wilderness, Betharabah, Middin, and Secacah,

verses.geez: ወሰኪዮዛን ፡ ወነፍላዛን ፡ ወአህጉሪሆን ፡ ሳለም ፡ ወአቃዴስ ፡ ሰብዑ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ወአዕጻዳቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: and Æochioza, and Naphlazon, and the cities of Sadon, and Ancades; seven cities, and their villages.
translations.kjv: And Nibshan, and the city of Salt, and Engedi; six cities with their villages.

verses.geez:
ወኢየቡሴዎን ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኢየሩሳሌም ፡ ስእንዎሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ አጥፍኦቶሙ ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ኢየቡሴዎን
                  ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኢየሩሳሌም ፡ እስከ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: And the Jebusite dwelt in Jerusalem, and the children of Juda could not destroy them; and the Jebusites dwelt in Jerusalem to this day.
translations.kjv: As for the Jebusites the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the children of Judah could not drive them out: but the Jebusites dwell with the children of Judah at Jerusalem unto this day.
